flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at University of Massachusetts-Dartmouth vs the 2018–2022 baseline (49.0% vs 55.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Massachusetts-Dartmouth fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
